== Notes for [[Item:Q106295|Q106295]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source:

ID: I180898

Name: Umm Farwa bint Ja'far al-Husayn 1

Sex: F

Birth: ABT 733 1

Father: Abu Abd Allah , Ja'far Shia Imam al-Husayn b: ABT 708

Mother: Fatima bint al-Husayn b: ABT 710

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:5465142031020081662

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
